name: io.github.Edu963/ocultar-pii-mistral
description: Zero-egress PII redaction for Mistral Le Chat. Runs locally — no data leaves your infrastructure. Optimised for French and EU compliance (RGPD, CNIL, SIRET, IBAN).

environmentVariables.name: OCULTAR_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of your locally running Ocultar Refinery

environmentVariables.name: OCULTAR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ocultar API key (leave blank if not configured)

environmentVariables.name: OCULTAR_AUDITOR_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Enables reveal_tokens tool. Must match OCU_AUDITOR_TOKEN on the server.
